title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at dnata India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at dnata India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at dnata India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About dnata India:
dnata India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
